title: Customer with embedded Address
prompt: Build MyApp.CRM.Customer with fields name and email, plus an embedded single Address (fields: street, city, postal_code, country). Use embeds_one for the address. Address should be its own embedded_schema module MyApp.CRM.Address with a changeset/2 function. In Customer's changeset, call cast_embed with &Address.changeset/2. Write both modules to lib/my_app/crm/customer.ex.
tier_rationale: Canonical embeds_one + cast_embed pair. Easy because the modeling call is obvious: address is single-parent and never queried independently.
